title: Core Architectural Components of a Blockchain
description: A visual breakdown of the fundamental elements that constitute a blockchain system and how they interact to create a secure, decentralized ledger.
relationships: Each Block contains a Hash of the previous Block, forming a chain
The P2P Network of nodes propagates and validates new Blocks
The Consensus Mechanism ensures all nodes agree on the state of the Ledger
The Cryptographic Hash ensures data integrity and immutability
